# Lee College SBDC - Baytown Local Routing for Houston/77084

## Why this resource matters to Houston/77084 routing
Lee College SBDC - Baytown is relevant to the Houston-area SBDC search context. One of the four SBA 77084 search results; likely best for East Harris/Chambers/Liberty rather than west Houston.

## Service area
Chambers, East Harris, and Liberty counties

## Contact
- Address: 909 Decker Drive, Suite 105, Baytown, TX 77520
- Phone: 281-425-6309
- Email: LeeCollegeSBDC@lee.edu
- Hours: Monday-Thursday, 7:30 a.m.-5:15 p.m.; Friday, 7:30 a.m.-12:30 p.m.

## BOSS routing notes
- Use the SBA ZIP locator as the official entry point.
- Ask for the user's business address ZIP/county before final office routing.
- For a user in 77084, do not assume the center solely from city name; verify service-area fit.
